template.description: The template type for a generic Modbus TCP device.

devtype.description: Device type name used by the IBEK support module.

server.description: Default IP address for connections (can be overridden per connection).

port.description: Default Modbus TCP port (can be overridden per connection).

connections.description: List of Modbus TCP connections (physical devices/PLCs).

connection.description: A single Modbus TCP connection, shared by all its slaves/register blocks.

name.description: Asyn port name for this Modbus TCP connection.

server.description: IP address of the device (overrides the IOC-level default).

port.description: Modbus TCP port (overrides the IOC-level default).

slaves.description: List of register blocks (one modbusAsynConfigure per contiguous block) on this connection.

slave.description: A contiguous Modbus register/coil block, read or written as one unit.

name.description: Unique Modbus port name for this register block (MODBUSPORT).

func_code.description: Modbus function code: 1/2 read coils/discrete inputs, 3/4 read registers, 5/15 write coils, 6/16 write registers. Default: 4

start_addr.description: Start address of the block (STARTADDR). Default: 0

length.description: Length of the block in bits (coil function codes) or 16-bit words (register function codes). Default: 52

data_type.description: Modbus register data type (see modbus module docs). Default: 7

registers.description: Individual PVs within this block, at an OFFSET relative to start_addr.

register.description: A single PV mapped onto a register or coil within a slave block.

name.description: Name used to build the PV suffix (R = ":<name>") unless 'r' is given.

r.description: Explicit PV suffix override, including leading ':'.

offset.description: Offset (word or bit, depending on func_code) relative to the slave's start_addr.

type.description: Register data kind: 32-bit float, 32-bit int, or single coil/discrete bit. Default: float

access.description: Whether this creates a readout or a setpoint/write. Default: read

desc.description: Record DESC field. Defaults to the register name.

scan.description: SCAN field (int readouts and coil readouts). Default: I/O Intr

pini.description: PINI field for setpoints (float/int writes). Default: NO
